/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Task2.dir/src/Graph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Task2.dir/src/Render.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Task2.dir/src/main.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/Task2.dir/_deps/imgui-src/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/Task2.dir/_deps/imgui-src/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/Task2.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/Task2.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_demo.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/Task2.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_draw.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/Task2.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_tables.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/Task2.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_widgets.cpp.o" -o Task2  _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
